title: Showing decided but unbuilt decisions
question: How should decisions whose choice is made but not yet built into the app show up in the viewer?
rationale: Add an optional 'built' flag, separate from the decided/open status, and surface unbuilt decisions the same way open ones surface (d13): a pinned 'Not built yet' group, a filter toggle, and an inline pill — all hidden when nothing is unbuilt. Kept separate from status because a decided-but-unbuilt decision is still decided; overloading status would clash with d13.

options.label: Separate 'built' flag, surfaced like open decisions (d13)

tradeoffs.note: the gap between deciding and shipping is always in view, and one click isolates it
the group, chip and pill all vanish when everything is built
dormant for projects that never set the flag, like version (d36) — safe for the shared template
reuses d13's pinned-group + filter surfaces; one new optional field to plumb through

options.label: Add a third status value (status: planned)

tradeoffs.note: no new field; reuse the status pill and open-filter machinery
a decided-but-unbuilt decision IS decided; folding it into status conflates 'was it chosen' with 'is it built' and clashes with d13

options.label: Inline pill only, no group or filter

tradeoffs.note: just a badge in the detail panel
unbuilt status only visible after opening that one decision; can't scan or isolate the backlog
